content.text:
order=0 的语义是"首个非 billing system block"，不是原始数组索引

这里是否有点笨拙？是否这个billing system block，应该考虑为也是一个rule/structure？

请分析如何建模更合理？

system.text: You are Claude Code, Anthropic's official CLI for Claude.

_fixtureNote: session-title side query: generateSessionTitle() internal Haiku call. Sourcemap proof (restored-src/src/utils/sideQuery.ts): sideQuery() bypasses sessionStorage entirely — no promptId is set, no JSONL entry is written. promptId is only set by processTextPrompt() (user main-session input path). Therefore: no session.jsonl exists for this query by design. Audit mode: --proxy-only (attribution-only, no JSONL reconcile).
